name: HTTP TTS Bridge
description: Text-to-speech bridge for a configurable local or remote HTTP TTS server.

serverUrl.label: IP / Server URL
serverUrl.description: Base URL for the TTS server

style.label: Style
style.description: Speaking style or preset sent to the custom server

apiKey.label: API key
apiKey.description: Optional key for custom server authorization

configFile.label: Config file
configFile.description: Optional JSON adapter config file for non-standard servers
